description: pylnk3 is a python library to parse / create Windows Shortcut File (.lnk) files. Useful for payload delivery.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/pylnk3 && python3 pylnk3.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/pylnk3 && python3 pylnk3.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/pylnk3 && python3 pylnk3.py --help`. Read/write Windows .lnk shortcut files.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the exploit category. Fits when the engagement needs: Read/write Windows .lnk shortcut files.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Read/write Windows .lnk shortcut files.

name: pylnk3

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
